title: lippia hoehnei
intro: Lippia hoehnei, also known as Hoehne's lippia, is a plant species native to Brazil that belongs to the Verbenaceae family and is used in traditional medicine. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lippia hoehnei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
